docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY GOBST, ZACHARY AS TO DEFENDANT LITKE, DIANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
